title: Show your thinking with digital tools
staff_situations: How do I show learners what I'm thinking?
underlying_needs: Making expert thinking visible to learners rather than just the finished answer
Creating a reusable record of modelled thinking instead of a one-off, in-the-moment explanation
Giving learners something to rewatch or re-read when working independently

accessibility: Screen recordings and think-aloud videos can carry captions and a transcript
Annotated slides give a visual record to sit alongside spoken explanation
inclusive_practice: A reusable recording lets a learner revisit modelled thinking at their own pace
Supports learners who need to see a process more than once before attempting it themselves
